name: Solei Systems, Inc.
summary: Solei Systems, Inc. provides telemedicine services in the United States, Mexico, Thailand, Malaysia, Spain, Italy, and internationally. The company offers CareClix, a Software as a Service (SaaS) telemedicine platform that enables hospital systems and multi-specialty groups to provide virtual consultations with patients; and MyCareClix, a direct-to-consumer website that provides primary care, as well as specialty and behavior health care directly to consumers. It also provides chronic care remote patient monitoring program targeting providers and provider groups with a turn-key solution for their medicare patients. The company was formerly known as Eli Enterprises, Inc. and changed its name to Solei Systems, Inc. in March 2008. Solei Systems, Inc. is based in Melbourne, Florida.
